verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the final functional v0.27.5 commit containing daily economic reconciliation, bottleneck reporting, transactional persistence, the locked day-60 economy fingerprint, speed-batch consistency coverage and the world-save app version; later README, roadmap, CODEX and manifest commits may follow it.
